x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: avromagic auto-magically generates C# classes from an Avro Schema Registry.

options.name: --schema-path
options.description:
The schema registry URL or File
Path

options.name: --subject-pattern
options.description:
Regex pattern to determine which
schemas to retrieve

options.name: --output-dir
options.description:
Output directory where to output
the generated C# classes

options.name: --namespace-mapping
options.description:
Map namespace from Producer's to
Consumer's e.g.
com.user:Sucrose.User
